video_title: AI: relief holes pierced around the wick of a set candle

seconds.vision_desc: Top-down close-up of a set cream soy candle in a glass jar, three thin relief holes pierced into the wax around the wick, a wooden skewer resting across the jar rim
very slow orbit around the jar, the three skewer holes around the wick clearly visible in the smooth wax
orbit continues, warm workshop light raking across the pierced candle top, skewer balanced on the rim
the relief holes and wick in sharp focus, wood grain of the skewer catching light
slow orbit reveals the depth of the thin holes pierced into the set wax
candle top with three relief holes around the wick, skewer across the rim, warm tones
orbiting view of the pierced candle top, glass rim reflections
final angle of the relief-hole pierced candle with the resting skewer

windows.embed_text: three thin relief holes pierced into set cream wax around the wick of a jar candle, wooden skewer resting across the jar rim, slow orbit in warm workshop light
